description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsDark red velvet finish bag Top stitching at front and backFlap with magnetic button and ring detailBranding at back One main zippered compartmentInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket at backOne short handle for carrying easeMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 32 cmWidth: 39 cm
